{"join": "results.driverId->drivers", "per_task": {"driver-dnf": {"normal_jrn": 1.3582, "shuffled_jrn": 1.273, "jrn_structural": 0.0853, "jrn_feature": 0.273, "structural_fraction": 0.238}, "driver-top3": {"normal_jrn": 1.3887, "shuffled_jrn": 1.319, "jrn_structural": 0.0697, "jrn_feature": 0.319, "structural_fraction": 0.1793}, "driver-position": {"normal_jrn": 1.3505, "shuffled_jrn": 1.1137, "jrn_structural": 0.2368, "jrn_feature": 0.1137, "structural_fraction": 0.6757}}, "avg_normal_jrn": 1.3658, "avg_structural": 0.1306, "avg_feature": 0.2352, "interpretation": "HIGH structural component (structural=0.1306, feature=0.2352, normal_jrn=1.3658). Race results are highly driver-specific; position/points directly tied to individual driver performance."}
